/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/testall.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/testall.dir/src/tests/dryo_mkdirp.c.o CMakeFiles/testall.dir/src/tests/dryoinit.c.o CMakeFiles/testall.dir/src/tests/dryologging.c.o CMakeFiles/testall.dir/src/tests/testall.c.o -o testall  -Wl,-rpath,/home/nephh/Documents/Repos/Mine/DryoX/libdryox/cmake-build libdryox.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/nephh/Documents/Repos/Mine/DryoX/libdryox/cmake-build
